description_long: This is a rectangular, two-story factory building with a flat, gray roof and a tall, cylindrical smokestack rising from one side. The exterior walls are clad in a light gray material, possibly concrete or brick, and feature several large, industrial-style windows with blue-tinted glass. One side of the building has a metal staircase leading to a raised platform, suggesting an emergency exit or secondary access point. The main facade includes multiple large doors, likely for loading and unloading goods, and a few smaller access doors. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation, emphasizing function over form and reflecting a modern industrial architectural style.
description: A rectangular, gray industrial factory building with a tall smokestack, large blue-tinted windows, and multiple loading doors. Features include a flat roof, metal staircase, and utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tall smokestack adjacent to the building and three large windows on the visible wall.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the long wall with several windows, a metal staircase, and a raised platform.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the smokestack on the far side and a small platform with railing visible.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the main entrance with multiple large doors, several industrial windows, and the prominent smokestack.
